script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
# 1) Restore /home/azureuser to its original mode (was changed to 0711 earlier)
chown azureuser:azureuser /home/azureuser
chmod 0750 /home/azureuser

# 2) Install the maintenance script
cat > /usr/local/sbin/maintain-claude-creds.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Keep shared Claude credential readable by all bot users in azureuser group.
# Runs every 5 min via claude-creds-maint.timer. Fixes drift after Claude CLI
# token refresh, which writes the file at 0600 by default and would block the
# 16 symlink-based per-user bots from reading it.
set +e
HOME_DIR=/home/azureuser
CLAUDE_DIR=/home/azureuser/.claude
CRED=/home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json

normalize() {
  local path="$1" want_mode="$2" want_owner="$3"
  [ -e "$path" ] || return 0
  local mode owner
  mode=$(stat -c '%a' "$path" 2>/dev/null)
  owner=$(stat -c '%U:%G' "$path" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$mode" != "$want_mode" ] || [ "$owner" != "$want_owner" ]; then
    chown "$want_owner" "$path"
    chmod "$want_mode" "$path"
    logger -t claude-creds-maint "normalized $path: was $mode $owner -> $want_mode $want_owner"
  fi
}

normalize "$HOME_DIR"   750  azureuser:azureuser
normalize "$CLAUDE_DIR" 750  azureuser:azureuser
normalize "$CRED"       640  azureuser:azureuser
EOF
chmod 0755 /usr/local/sbin/maintain-claude-creds.sh

# 3) Install systemd service + timer
cat > /etc/systemd/system/claude-creds-maint.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Normalize shared Claude credential ownership/mode (per-user bots depend on it)

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/maintain-claude-creds.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/claude-creds-maint.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Re-normalize Claude credential every 5 minutes (recovers from CLI token refresh that drops mode to 0600)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
Unit=claude-creds-maint.service
AccuracySec=10s

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF

# 4) Activate
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable --now claude-creds-maint.timer

# 5) Run once now + verify
systemctl start claude-creds-maint.service
echo '=== timer status ==='
systemctl list-timers claude-creds-maint.timer --no-pager 2>&1 | head -5
echo '=== service last run ==='
systemctl status claude-creds-maint.service --no-pager 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== current file state ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '===END==='
